devdoc.details: A smart contract for managing student academic records. Only the contract owner can add and update student records, while anyone can view student information.

addStudent(uint256,string,uint256,string.details: Adds a new student record. Only the owner can call this function.

getAllStudentIds().details: Returns all student IDs stored in the contract.

getStudent(uint256).details: Returns a student record by ID. Anyone can call this function.

getStudentCount().details: Returns the total number of student records.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership to another address. Only current owner can call this function.

updateStudent(uint256,string,uint256,str.details: Updates an existing student record. Only the owner can call this function.
